title: Short listing
summary: A concise description ready for quick editing.
steps: Add condition and the main benefit.

title: Short listing — full template
steps: The item is clean and ready to use.

title: Friendly listing
steps: Start with a short item intro.
Add who it may be useful for.

title: Friendly listing — full template
summary: A natural and inviting listing template.
steps: It may be useful for someone looking for [use case].
I can answer questions or provide more details.

title: Detailed listing
summary: Longer description with condition, features and delivery.
warnings: A detailed description must stay truthful.

title: Detailed listing — full template
summary: Template for items where buyers need more information.

title: Electronics — careful listing
summary: For electronics, clearly describe technical condition.
warnings: Do not sell as working if you are not sure.

title: Electronics — full template
summary: Template with condition, accessories and test notes.
dontDo: do not guarantee operation without testing

title: Used item
summary: A used item needs clear information about wear.
steps: State that the item was used.
List visible wear or lack of defects.
warnings: The buyer should know the real condition.

title: Used item — full template
summary: Honest template for a used item.
dontDo: do not write like new if wear is visible

title: Listing description
warnings: The description must match real condition.

summary: Neutral listing to edit before publishing.
